seoTitle: How to Change Your Signature in Freshdesk
metaDescription: Learn how to update your existing email signature in Freshdesk when your title, branding, or contact details change.
intro: Job titles change, branding gets refreshed, and your Freshdesk signature should keep up. This guide shows how to update an existing signature.

steps.heading: Go to your profile settings
steps.body: Log in and open your personal settings page where signature options live.

steps.heading: Open the signature editor
steps.body: Find your current signature in the editor, ready for editing.

steps.heading: Update the details
steps.body: Change the text, title, or formatting to reflect the current information you want displayed.

steps.heading: Save the updated signature
steps.body: Save your changes and send a test reply to confirm the new signature appears correctly.

faq.question: Will changing my signature affect past replies?
faq.answer: No, updating your signature only affects future replies, not messages already sent.

faq.question: Can I have different signatures for different situations?
faq.answer: Some setups allow multiple signature templates, though a single default signature per agent is most common.

faq.question: Do I need admin rights to change my own signature?
faq.answer: No, agents can typically update their own personal signature without needing admin permissions.

faq.question: Can I include formatting like bold text or links?
faq.answer: Yes, if your signature editor supports rich text, you can include formatting, links, and sometimes images.
